title: Update CI images with a dedicated registry that supports both schema1 and schema2
body:
This validates, and updates for, https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/437 .

After this merges, I expect the bot to close https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2772 .

comments.body: @mtrmac LGTM but still in draft. Any further changes expected?
@mtrmac please merge per convenience if no changes.
